name: Cartier Resources Inc.
description: Cartier Resources Inc. is a junior gold explorer focused on the Cadillac project in Quebec's Val-d'Or region, holding 100% ownership along 15 km of the Larder Lake-Cadillac Fault Zone including the historical Chimo Mine. The company has 3.18 million total ounces of gold in resources and a 100,000-metre drill program backed by a C$12 million budget, with Agnico Eagle as a 27% strategic shareholder.
